title: no_sleeps_modpack
description: This Minecraft mod pack is designed to enhance and expand upon the existing vanilla mechanics of the game while staying true to the original Minecraft experience.
body: This Minecraft mod pack is designed to enhance and expand upon the existing vanilla mechanics of the game while staying true to the original Minecraft experience. It focuses on adding depth and variety to the core gameplay in a way that feels natural, without straying from the classic vanilla style. In addition to new features, this mod pack also addresses various bugs, improves game performance, and enhances the overall visual experience, making your Minecraft world not only more efficient but also more beautiful and immersive.
